name: Close the Production Order Agent
tagline: Validate, approve, and close production orders through an 8-stage lifecycle
description: Validates, approves, and closes released production orders on Microsoft Dynamics 365 Business Central. Runs an 8-stage lifecycle that identifies candidate orders, validates output, consumption, routing, and warehouse completeness, triages exceptions against company-specific thresholds, builds an approval packet, routes fixes, finishes the order, and notifies stakeholders — keeping quality, traceability, and financial integrity intact while removing manual effort from the close workflow.
